queries.question: Show me the photojournalist who took the most recent photo.
queries.sql:
SELECT Photojournalists.Name
FROM Assignments
JOIN Photojournalists ON Assignments.PhotojournalistId = Photojournalists.ID 
JOIN PublishedPhotos ON PublishedPhotos.AssignmentId = Assignments.id 
ORDER BY PublishedPhotos.PublicationDate DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?photojournalists a :Photojournalists .
  ?assignments p:hasPhotojournalists ?photojournalists .
  ?publishedphotos a :PublishedPhotos .
  ?publishedphotos p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?photojournalists p:name ?name .
  ?publishedphotos p:PublicationDate ?publicationdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publicationdate_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: List the events of photos published in 2022
queries.sql: SELECT Events.Title FROM Assignments JOIN Events ON Assignments.EventId = Events.ID JOIN PublishedPhotos ON PublishedPhotos.AssignmentId = Assignments.id WHERE  strftime('%Y', PublishedPhotos.PublicationDate) = '2022'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?pp a :PublishedPhotos ; p:PublicationDate ?d ; p:hasAssignments ?asg .
  ?asg a :Assignments ; p:hasEvents ?ev .
  ?ev a :Events ; p:Title ?title .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?d), "2022"))
}
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): strftime year-extraction (SQLite-only); NL intent = published in 2022

queries.question: List the photojournalists whose photos were published in 2022 and the events depicted in these photos.
queries.sql: SELECT Photojournalists.Name , Events.Title FROM Assignments JOIN Events ON Assignments.EventId = Events.ID JOIN PublishedPhotos ON PublishedPhotos.AssignmentId = Assignments.id JOIN Photojournalists ON Assignments.PhotojournalistId = Photojournalists.ID  WHERE  strftime('%Y', PublishedPhotos.PublicationDate) = '2022'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?pp a :PublishedPhotos ; p:PublicationDate ?d ; p:hasAssignments ?asg .
  ?asg a :Assignments ; p:hasEvents ?ev ; p:hasPhotojournalists ?pj .
  ?ev a :Events ; p:Title ?title .
  ?pj a :Photojournalists ; p:name ?name .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?d), "2022"))
}
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): strftime year-extraction (SQLite-only); NL intent = published in 2022

queries.question: Show me the photojournalist and the event of the most recent photo.
queries.sql:
SELECT Photojournalists.Name , Events.Title
FROM Assignments
JOIN Events ON Assignments.EventId = Events.ID
JOIN PublishedPhotos ON PublishedPhotos.AssignmentId = Assignments.id  JOIN Photojournalists ON Assignments.PhotojournalistId = Photojournalists.ID 
ORDER BY PublishedPhotos.PublicationDate DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?assignments p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?publishedphotos a :PublishedPhotos .
  ?publishedphotos p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?photojournalists a :Photojournalists .
  ?assignments p:hasPhotojournalists ?photojournalists .
  ?photojournalists p:name ?name .
  ?events p:Title ?title .
  ?publishedphotos p:PublicationDate ?publicationdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publicationdate_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the origin of the most recent photo
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?photojournalists a :Photojournalists .
  ?assignments p:hasPhotojournalists ?photojournalists .
  ?publishedphotos a :PublishedPhotos .
  ?publishedphotos p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?photojournalists p:name ?name .
  ?publishedphotos p:PublicationDate ?publicationdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publicationdate_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?title WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?assignments p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?publishedphotos a :PublishedPhotos .
  ?publishedphotos p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?photojournalists a :Photojournalists .
  ?assignments p:hasPhotojournalists ?photojournalists .
  ?photojournalists p:name ?name .
  ?events p:Title ?title .
  ?publishedphotos p:PublicationDate ?publicationdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publicationdate_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?assignments a :Assignments .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?assignments p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?publishedphotos a :PublishedPhotos .
  ?publishedphotos p:hasAssignments ?assignments .
  ?events p:Title ?title .
  ?publishedphotos p:PublicationDate ?publicationdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publicationdate_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
